members.name: swarm-s1
members.spawn_prompt:
## Swarm Task: Analyze ClaudeCode Competitor

**Task ID:** s1
**Title:** Analyze ClaudeCode Competitor

Review the source code in ../claude-code-sourcemap to analyze ClaudeCode's features and capabilities. Document your findings including key functionalities, unique features, and potential gaps in a separate analysis file in target/temp/swarmout.

You are part of a swarm team. Complete this specific task.

IMPORTANT: Your VERY FIRST action must be a tool call. Call `team_read_messages` with team_name set to the team name from your context. Do NOT respond with text first — call the tool immediately.

After reading messages, do the work described above using tool calls (glob, read, bash, etc.). When done, call `team_task_complete` to mark task "s1" as completed.
Focus only on your assigned task — other teammates are handling other parts.

## Swarm Task: Create SWARMOUT2.md Document

**Task ID:** s6
**Title:** Create SWARMOUT2.md Document

Create a comprehensive document called SWARMOUT2.md in target/temp/swarmout that includes: 1) Summary of feature gaps identified, 2) Detailed implementation plan with milestones and tasks, 3) Prioritization of features based on competitive advantage and implementation effort. Base this on the product review from s5 and competitor analyses from s1-s4.
